response.justification: Sarah Smith is a capable full-stack and systems engineer with 15+ years of broad experience, but the resume shows no alignment with the core domain of this role. There is no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, growth engineering, or telemetry/metrics system design. The role demands IC6-level cross-org impact in a very specific discipline—growth and experimentation systems—that is entirely absent from her history. Her most relevant signal is high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby, but that alone does not offset the domain gap.
strengths: High-scale distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded systems with staff-level roles, suggesting strong engineering fundamentals
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the company's AI-first developer-tools context
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk systems—the core technical domain of this role
No growth engineering or telemetry/metrics platform experience; no mention of funnels, conversion tracking, or statistical analysis work
Title and demonstrated scope are Senior/Staff, not Principal IC6; no record of multi-team or cross-org architectural influence at the required scale

key_factors.factor: No growth or telemetry domain experience
